channel.title: World of Skywater
channel.description: A personal archive of essays, poems, mathematics, pictures, and stray thoughts.

item.title: Markdown Test
item.description: Heading One This is a paragraph with bold and italic text. Also some inline code . Heading Two Here is a link to home . Heading Three List item one List item tw…

item.title: Lake Reflection
item.description: [A photograph of still water, mirroring clouds that are not there.] The lake does not distinguish between sky and shore. It reflects what passes overhead and wh…

item.title: The Topology of Coffee
item.description: The cup is a manifold. The handle, a torus. When you drink, you traverse a homeomorphism between the liquid state and your internal geometry. This is not metaph…

item.title: Fibonacci in Nature
item.description: The spiral of a nautilus shell does not follow the Fibonacci sequence. This is the first thing they do not teach you. What it does follow is a logarithmic spira…

item.title: Static
item.description: The radio hums between stations. Not silence, but the shape of silence— white noise wearing a collar of static, pretending to be a voice. I have grown accustome…
